description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof and a spacious, rectangular layout. The exterior features a combination of light-colored walls, large glass windows, and brickwork, giving it a contemporary yet inviting appearance. The property is surrounded by a low brick and glass fence, enclosing landscaped gardens, a swimming pool, and a separate hot tub area. The main entrance is accentuated by a paved driveway and a covered porch, while the backyard includes green hedges and outdoor seating. The roofline is clean and horizontal, with minimal overhangs and a mix of solid and open sections for natural light. The overall design emphasizes open outdoor spaces, privacy, and modern architectural elements.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with brick and glass exterior, landscaped gardens, and a pool within a walled property.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, pool, hot tub, and landscaped front yard enclosed by a brick and glass fence.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the pool, hot tub, garden areas, and the length of the flat-roofed structure with visible windows.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, green hedges, outdoor seating, and the back entrance with a large paved area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the driveway, garage area, and the full extent of the walled property with both pool and hot tub visible.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and front windows
